parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id,
  c.full_name,
  c.email,
  c.phone,
  'pt' AS language_detected,
  c.lead_tier,
  c.lead_score,
  COALESCE(c.preferred_locations[1], 'Lisboa') AS zone_interest,
  c.budget_max,
  COALESCE(c.typologies_wanted[1], '') AS typology,
  c.last_contact_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - c.last_contact_at)) / 86400 AS days_dormant
FROM contacts c
WHERE c.last_contact_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND c.status IN ('lead', 'prospect', 'qualified', 'active')
  AND c.lead_tier IN ('A', 'B')
  AND c.email IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.lead_score DESC, c.last_contact_at ASC
LIMIT 50

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.email_subject }}
